database.name: VIEW SSCCR_CARD_REC_DETAIL_V
database.view: SELECT pcrl.ssccr_pos_card_rec_line_id AS ssccr_card_rec_detail_v_id, pcrl.ad_client_id, pcrl.ad_org_id, pcrl.isactive, pcrl.created, pcrl.createdby, pcrl.updated, pcrl.updatedby, pcrl.ssccr_pos_card_rec_id, pcrl.group_id AS fin_finacc_transaction_id, pcrl.fin_payment_id, pcrl.c_invoice_id, pcrl.c_order_id, pcrl.recap, pcrl.lot, pcrl.amount, pcrl.deposit_amount, pcrl.type, pcrl.reconciled, pcrl.ssccr_types_of_credit_id, pcrl.expiration_date, pcrl.ssccr_cards_types_id, pcrl.ssccr_processor_banck_id, pcrl.ssfi_banktransfer_id, pcrl.date_statement, pcrl.confirmation_no FROM ssccr_pos_card_rec_line pcrl JOIN ssccr_pos_card_rec pcr ON pcr.ssccr_pos_card_rec_id = pcrl.ssccr_pos_card_rec_id JOIN fin_finacc_transaction ft ON ft.fin_finacc_transaction_id = pcrl.group_id WHERE pcrl.reconciled = 'Y' AND pcr.status = 'RE' ORDER BY pcr.documentno, pcrl.type
